name: Llanowar Elves
flavor_text: One bone broken for every twig snapped underfoot.
design_notes: The original 1-mana mana dork. Defines green's color identity as the color of mana acceleration. A 1/1 body for 1 mana that taps for mana is the baseline for mana creatures. Creature type 'Elf Druid' shows how type lines encode both race and class.
